Mesa, Beignet, gecko@, USES=compiler:c++14-lang already switched to devel/llvm50. Let's follow the suit.

Can you check runtime? Otherwise, builds fine on 10.3 i386/amd64, 11.1 i386/amd64, 12.0 amd64.
